raw:
{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.7,
    "R1.2": 1.0,
    "R1.3": 0.7,
    "R1.4": 0.3,
    "R1.5": 0.3,
    "R1.6": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.3,
    "RX.1": 1.0,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Should the check prioritize (A) writing polish and clarity, (B) logical and claim–evidence consistency, or (C) novelty/citation verification of “first” and related claims?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Ensure the thesis, contribution, and problem framing are coherently reconstructed at the paragraph level.",
    "R1.2": "Verify the internal logic linking the proposed method, baselines, and stated claims holds without contradiction.",
    "R1.3": "Check that performance claims are directly supported by the reported datasets, metrics, and comparisons as written.",
    "R1.6": "Improve sentence-level clarity, grammar, and concision without altering higher-level content.",
    "RX.1": "Any feedback will clearly note uncertainties, assumptions, and places where the excerpt lacks sufficient detail.",
    "RX.2": "The check will avoid endorsing unsupported superlatives and flag scope-exceeding claims.",
    "RX.3": "The work will remain within checking the text rather than redesigning methods or experiments.",
    "RX.4": "The review will be sensitive to harms from overgeneralization across languages or mischaracterizing resource constraints.",
    "RX.5": "All observations will be traceable to specific passages in the provided excerpt and cited references as mentioned."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the check prioritize (A) writing polish and clarity, (B) logical and claim–evidence consistency, or (C) novelty/citation verification of “first” and related claims?

rationale.R1.1: Ensure the thesis, contribution, and problem framing are coherently reconstructed at the paragraph level.
rationale.R1.2: Verify the internal logic linking the proposed method, baselines, and stated claims holds without contradiction.
rationale.R1.3: Check that performance claims are directly supported by the reported datasets, metrics, and comparisons as written.
rationale.R1.6: Improve sentence-level clarity, grammar, and concision without altering higher-level content.
rationale.RX.1: Any feedback will clearly note uncertainties, assumptions, and places where the excerpt lacks sufficient detail.
rationale.RX.2: The check will avoid endorsing unsupported superlatives and flag scope-exceeding claims.
rationale.RX.3: The work will remain within checking the text rather than redesigning methods or experiments.
rationale.RX.4: The review will be sensitive to harms from overgeneralization across languages or mischaracterizing resource constraints.
rationale.RX.5: All observations will be traceable to specific passages in the provided excerpt and cited references as mentioned.
